data.title: Sync Go client with Python notebooklm-py API changes
data.body:
## Scope
Bring the Go nlm client in line with recent Google API changes tracked by the Python notebooklm-py reference implementation.

## Non-goals
- Adding entirely new feature commands (research, export, etc.) — only fix divergent values and stale params for existing functionality
- Rewriting the grpcendpoint package (dead code, separate cleanup)

## Key decisions
- Python notebooklm-py (teng-lin/notebooklm-py) is the source of truth for API values
- Submodule at reference/notebooklm-py for cross-referencing

data.title: Update stale BL (Build Label) param
data.body:
## Goal
- Update the default BL param from `20260210.19` to `20260301.03` across all Go files
- Also update the ancient `20250903.07` in grpcendpoint/handler.go and the `20250129.00` in proto template

## Context
- Python default: `boq_labs-tailwind-frontend_20260301.03_p0`
- Go rpc/rpc.go: `20260210.19` (3 weeks behind)
- Go grpcendpoint/handler.go: `20250903.07` (6 months behind)
- Go proto template: `20250129.00`
- Gen service files: `20260210.19`
- All support NLM_BL_PARAM env override, but defaults should match Python

## Acceptance Criteria
- All hardcoded BL params updated to `20260301.03`
- `grep -r boq_labs-tailwind *.go **/*.go` shows only `20260301.03` (excluding testdata/reference)

## Validation Gates
- `go build ./...`
- `grep -rn boq_labs-tailwind --include="*.go" | grep -v testdata | grep -v reference | grep -v 20260301`  should return nothing

data.title: Fix ChatGoal and ResponseLength enum values
data.body:
## Goal
- Align ChatGoal and ResponseLength constants with Python reference values
- Current Go values appear swapped/wrong vs Python

## Context
- ChatGoal: Go has Default=3, LearningGuide=1, Custom=2. Python has DEFAULT=1, CUSTOM=2, LEARNING_GUIDE=3
- ResponseLength: Go has Default=0, Longer=4, Shorter=3. Python has DEFAULT=1, LONGER=4, SHORTER=5
- File: internal/notebooklm/api/client.go lines 2626-2641
- Python source of truth: reference/notebooklm-py/src/notebooklm/rpc/types.py lines 270-289

## Acceptance Criteria
- ChatGoalDefault=1, ChatGoalCustom=2, ChatGoalLearningGuide=3
- ResponseLengthDefault=1, ResponseLengthLonger=4, ResponseLengthShorter=5
- SetChatConfig logic updated if needed (e.g. default check changes from 0 to 1)
- chat-config CLI subcommand still works with updated values

## Validation Gates
- `go build ./...`
- `go vet ./...`

data.title: Reconcile divergent RPC method IDs
data.body:
## Goal
- Fix RPC method IDs that differ between Go and Python
- Resolve the e3bVqc conflict (Go=DeleteChatHistory vs Python=PollResearch)

## Context
- CreateArtifact: Go=`xpWGLf` vs Python=`R7cb6c`
- DeleteArtifact: Go=`WxBZtb` vs Python=`V5N4be`
- e3bVqc: Go maps to DeleteChatHistory, Python maps to PollResearch — one is wrong or Google repurposed the ID
- Python unified all artifact creation under R7cb6c with ArtifactTypeCode discriminator
- File: internal/notebooklm/rpc/rpc.go
- Python source: reference/notebooklm-py/src/notebooklm/rpc/types.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- CreateArtifact and DeleteArtifact IDs match Python
- e3bVqc usage clarified — if Go DeleteChatHistory is wrong, find correct ID or remove
- Any callers of changed IDs updated
- Existing commands (create-artifact, delete-artifact, delete-chat) still build

## Validation Gates
- `go build ./...`
- `go vet ./...`

data.title: Add missing RPC method IDs and enums from Python
data.body:
## Goal
- Register new RPC method IDs discovered in Python that Go lacks
- Add missing enum types for artifact options

## Context
Missing RPC methods:
- Ljjv0c (StartFastResearch)
- QA9ei (StartDeepResearch)
- LBwxtb (ImportResearch)
- Krh3pd (ExportArtifact)
- v9rmvd (GetInteractiveHTML)
- KmcKPe (ReviseSlide)

Missing enums:
- InfographicOrientation/Detail/Style
- SlideDeckFormat/SlideDeckLength
- QuizQuantity/QuizDifficulty
- VideoStyle (10 styles)
- ExportType (Docs/Sheets)
- SourceStatus

This task only adds the constants/types — wiring them into CLI commands is separate future work.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All 6 RPC method IDs added to rpc.go
- Enum types defined in appropriate Go files
- Values match Python reference/notebooklm-py/src/notebooklm/rpc/types.py exactly

## Validation Gates
- `go build ./...`
- `go vet ./...`

data.title: Add artifact quota failure detection
data.body:
## Goal
- Detect when artifact creation silently fails due to daily quota
- Match Python behavior: after N consecutive not_found polls, report quota error instead of timing out

## Context
- Python added this April 2 (commit 0431411)
- When Google rejects artifact creation due to quota, the artifact vanishes from list responses
- Python detects 3 consecutive not_found polls and surfaces a quota error
- Without this, Go artifact creation hangs until timeout with no useful error
- Relevant Python file: reference/notebooklm-py/src/notebooklm/_artifacts.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- Artifact polling loop tracks consecutive not_found responses
- After 3 consecutive not_found, returns descriptive quota error
- Normal artifact flow (processing → completed) unaffected
- Normal not_found (single transient miss) does not trigger false positive

## Validation Gates
- `go build ./...`
- `go vet ./...`

## Goal
- Update the default BL param from 20260210.19 to 20260301.03 across all Go files

## Completion
Updated 6 files: rpc.go, grpcendpoint/handler.go (2 occurrences), 3 gen/service files, proto template. All now match Python default 20260301.03_p0.

## Goal
- Align ChatGoal and ResponseLength with Python reference

## Completion
ChatGoal: Default=1, Custom=2, LearningGuide=3. ResponseLength: Default=1, Longer=4, Shorter=5. SetChatConfig now uses 0 as no-change sentinel for both goal and length (not a valid enum value). CLI passes 0 when only changing one setting.

## Goal
- Fix divergent RPC method IDs

## Completion
CreateArtifact: xpWGLf → R7cb6c (matches Python unified artifact endpoint). DeleteArtifact: WxBZtb → V5N4be. Added comment on RPCCreateVideoOverview noting it shares the R7cb6c ID. Added comment on e3bVqc noting Python maps it to PollResearch — kept as DeleteChatHistory for now since no research features in Go yet.

data.summary: Artifact/source enum types matching Python notebooklm-py reference

data.body:
## Goal
- Add missing RPC method IDs and artifact enums from Python

## Completion
Added 7 RPC IDs to rpc.go: ExportArtifact, GetInteractiveHTML, ReviseSlide, StartFastResearch, StartDeepResearch, PollResearch, ImportResearch. Created artifact_types.go with 16 enum types matching Python exactly: ArtifactTypeCode, ArtifactStatus, AudioFormat, AudioLength, VideoFormat, VideoStyle, QuizQuantity, QuizDifficulty, InfographicOrientation/Detail/Style, SlideDeckFormat/Length, ExportType, SourceStatus, ShareViewLevel.

data.summary: WaitForArtifact with quota-failure detection matching Python behavior

data.body:
## Goal
- Detect artifact quota failures instead of timing out

## Completion
Created artifact_poll.go with WaitForArtifact(ctx, projectID, artifactID) — polls ListArtifacts with exponential backoff (2s→10s), tracks consecutive and total not_found responses. After 5 consecutive not_found spanning >=10s (or 10 total), returns descriptive quota error. Matches Python wait_for_completion semantics. 5min timeout with context cancellation support.
